description_long: This is a classic wooden rocking armchair featuring a high backrest and a seat upholstered in a red and black checkered fabric. The frame is constructed from dark-stained wood, with elegantly curved rockers and armrests that are smoothly contoured for comfort. The armrests are solid wood and extend forward, supported by turned wooden posts. The seat and backrest are both padded and covered in the same checkered fabric, which shows some subtle wear and small decorative details. The back of the chair reveals horizontal wooden slats reinforcing the structure. This armchair exudes a rustic, vintage charm and would be well-suited for a porch, park, or cozy urban nook.
description: A vintage wooden rocking armchair with a high, checkered fabric backrest and seat, curved rockers, and solid wood armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high backrest, checkered upholstery, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wooden rockers, angled backrest, and the profile of the armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden frame, horizontal support slats, and the back of the checkered upholstery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full rocker curve and armrest profile.
attribute_backrest_style: high, rectangular, upholstered with checkered fabric
attribute_leg_type: curved wooden rockers with turned wooden supports
